name: Muchomon

signature_move.name: Tropical Beak
signature_move.description: Repeatedly pecks with its colorful beak.

description: A Bird Digimon that is unable to fly, just like Penmon . As a Digimon brought up in tropical southern countries, it leads an always happy life. It possesses a bursting enthusiasm and dances with the rhythm of the samba , and its most favorite thing is its richly colored pelt. Its Special Move is repeatedly pecking with its colorful beak ( Tropical Beak ).
